fiverr_order_delivered.description: Completed delivery triggers case study generation

customer_milestone.task_template: Customer milestone: {milestone_text}. Compose 1 short celebration post in Rick's founder voice (proof-first, real numbers, dry humor — no corporate-speak). Output goes to ~/rick-vault/content/milestones/{customer_id}-{ts}.md. Channels: pick the 2 best fits from moltbook/reddit/linkedin/threads — match where similar past wins got engagement. Single sentence per channel. NO PII (no real customer names — use callsign or first name only with permission). Wired 2026-04-22 — the unfair-advantage compound: live receipts no competitor can fake.
customer_milestone.description: Auto-celebration post via Teagan when a real customer hits a milestone (the Rick Scoreboard Meme cornerstone — 8x engagement vs generic post per swarm analysis)

hot_lead_detected.description: High-score prospect routed to Remy for deep research

proof_artifact_ready.description: Proof content ready for Teagan to format and distribute

subagent_result.description: Wave 2B merger dispatches this when a subagent run finishes. Routes to ops thread so Rick sees completions land instead of them rotting in subagent_heartbeat.

trial_expiring.description: Trial about to end — route to retention sequence to convert or close

new_install.template: 🎯 New Rick install: callsign={callsign} country={country} tier={tier}
new_install.description: Fresh install ping — celebrates + gives operator situational awareness

charge_refunded.task_template: A charge was refunded (amount={amount} customer={email}). Read the customer record, classify reason (billing/dissatisfaction/fraud), write a brief retro to ~/rick-vault/operations/refund-retros/, and decide whether to add to suppression list.
charge_refunded.description: Refunds routed to Iris (customer-ops) for retro + decide suppression

linkedin_reply.task_template: A prospect replied to a LinkedIn DM. Thread: {thread_text}. Classify: buying-signal / objection / not-interested / neutral. Draft Rick's next response in founder voice. If buying-signal, queue deal_close workflow.
linkedin_reply.description: LinkedIn replies routed to Remy for triage + response draft

roast_request.description: Roast request landed on meetrick.ai. Auto-queue deal_close workflow so Rick chases the lead. Wired 2026-04-22 to close the leak Agent A found (roast leads were vanishing in the Railway container's ephemeral filesystem).

roast_request.template: 🔥 Roast lead captured: {url} — discovered emails: {emails} — workflow queued
roast_request.description: Loud confirmation in ops thread when a roast lead actually persists (not just the meetrick-subscribe-worker alert which fires regardless of capture success)
